zh.lifeSummary: 當John de St. Maur於1377年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特卡素 加里時，他的父親Richard Saint Maur22歲，母親Ela St. Lo22歲。他和Margaret de Erleigh至少有1個兒子。他去世於1415年10月16日在英國英格蘭戴文諾斯 莫爾頓享年38歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: St.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: 1  French: habitational name from any of the places so called, for example in Normandy, named from a religious dedication to a (male) St. Clair.
2  North American variant spelling of   St  .   Claire  .

variants.name: Claire
meanings: Irish: variant of   Clare  .
Variant of   Clair  , an altered form of German   Klare  .
French: variant of   Clair  .

variants.name: St
meanings: Americanized spelling of French   St  .   Denis  .

nameMeanings.name: Maur
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: nickname for someone supposedly resembling a mouse, in appearance or timidity, from Middle High German mūs ‘mouse’.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from German Maus ‘mouse’, one of the most common of the unflattering surnames imposed on Jews by non-Jewish government officials in 18th- and 19th-century central Europe.

variants.name: Muus
meanings: German (Hamburg): nickname for someone supposedly resembling a mouse, in appearance or timidity, from Middle High German mūs ‘mouse’. Compare Maus and Muhs .

variants.name: Muske
meanings: North German (also Müske): nickname from a diminutive of Middle Low German mūs ‘mouse’ (see Maus 1).

variants.name: Mauss
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Wilhelm.
German: variant of   Maus  .

variants.name: Meisel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Russian Anatoliy, Boris, Leonid, Yefim.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of   Meisel  .

variants.name: Mousel
meanings: Americanized form of German Mäusl, from a diminutive of Maus .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament: ‘God is gracious’. See John .

en.lifeSummary: When John de St. Maur was born in 1377, in Castle Cary, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Saint Maur, was 22 and his mother, Ela St. Lo, was 22. He had at least 1 son with Margaret de Erleigh. He died on 16 October 1415, in North Molton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38.

Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Margaret d’Erleigh. Il est décédé le 16 octobre 1415, à North Molton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: John de St. Maurが1377年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトカストル カーイで生まれた時，父Richard Saint Maurは22歳，母Ela St. Loは22歳であった。彼はMargaret de Erleighとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1415年10月16日にイギリスイギリスデボンノース モルトンで38歳で死去した。

ko.Beckington, Somerset, England, United Ki: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 베킨그턴 위스 스탠더윅
ko.lifeSummary: John de St. Maur(이)가 1377년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 카스틀 카리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Saint Maur(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Ela St. Lo(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Margaret de Erleigh(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1415년 10월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 노르스 모턴에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Beckington, Somerset, England, United Ki: беккингтон вит стандирвикк, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de St. Maur родился в 1377 г. в местности кастл кэри, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Saint Maur было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Ela St. Lo, 22. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Margaret de Erleigh. Он умер 16 октября 1415 г. в местности норт молтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет.
